# PERF-194 positive: time.Sleep used as a polling primitive in a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-194-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	for i := 0; i < 3; i++ {
		time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
		if r.Context().Err() != nil {
			return
		}
	}
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
